Container.Name: vault-api-rs
Container.Overview: REST API for managing Markdown notes in an Obsidian vault. Supports CRUD operations, full-text search, YAML frontmatter, and bearer token authentication.
Container.Description: REST API for managing Markdown notes in an Obsidian vault. Supports CRUD operations, full-text search, YAML frontmatter, and bearer token authentication.

Config.Name: Vault Path
Config.Description: Path to your Obsidian vault on the host

Config.Name: VAULT_ROOT
Config.Description: Vault root inside the container (should match the container path above)

Config.Name: API_TOKEN
Config.Description: Bearer token for API authentication (leave empty to disable auth)

Config.Name: ALLOWED_PATHS
Config.Description: Comma-separated list of allowed top-level folders (leave empty to allow all)
